metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for heurema open-source AI agent tools

plugins.name: anvil
plugins.description: Plugin dev/test toolkit for heurema. Scaffold new plugins from templates, validate structure and conventions with 5 deterministic Python validators, test hooks with fixture-driven runner, and review quality with a 20-item checklist agent.

plugins.name: arbiter
plugins.description: Multi-AI orchestrator — dispatch to Codex CLI and Gemini CLI for review, ask, implement, and panel modes. Replaces codex-partner with multi-provider support and compared results.

plugins.name: content-ops
plugins.description: Content operations for indie developers who ship in public. Create, QA, and distribute technical articles to dev.to, Hashnode, Twitter/X, and Hacker News.

plugins.name: delve
plugins.description: Deep research orchestrator — autonomous multi-agent research with stage-gated pipeline, adversarial claim verification, and resume support. 5 stages: SCAN, DECOMPOSE, DIVE, VERIFY, SYNTHESIZE.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Plugin lifecycle manager for heurema org. Scaffold, verify, register plugins.

plugins.name: genesis
plugins.description: Evolve startup ideas through AI-powered natural selection. 3 agent personas — Generator, Critic, Refiner — compete in a memetic algorithm with 8-dimension scoring, constraint enforcement, and actionable execution blueprints.

plugins.name: glyph
plugins.description: Generate polished terminal demo GIFs from natural language descriptions. Synthesizes asciicast recordings with realistic typing, configurable themes, and built-in PII auditing — no real shell commands executed.

plugins.name: herald
plugins.description: Daily curated news digest for your domain. Fetches RSS feeds and Hacker News via public APIs, applies 3-layer deduplication and keyword filtering, scores and ranks the top 10 items as a grouped Markdown digest. Zero API keys, fully local.

plugins.name: reporter
plugins.description: Report bugs, request features, and ask questions for any heurema product. Auto-detects repo, collects environment context, submits GitHub issues via gh CLI with clipboard fallback.

plugins.name: sentinel
plugins.description: AI Workstation Security Audit — 18 deterministic checks for secrets exposure, MCP trust, plugin permissions, hook coverage, trust boundaries, and configuration hygiene. Scored security posture with guided remediation and report diffing.

plugins.name: signum
plugins.description: Evidence-driven development pipeline with multi-model code review. Four phases (contract, execute, audit, pack) that generate code against a contract, audit with 3 independent AI models (Claude + Codex + Gemini), and package proof for CI.

plugins.name: teams-field-guide
plugins.description: Comprehensive field guide for Claude Code multi-agent systems. Covers Subagents and Agent Teams, custom agent configuration, 7 orchestration patterns, cost optimization with model distribution, known bugs with workarounds, and 26 ecosystem projects.
